name: Site Plan Review
meaning: Indicates that project requires Site Plan Review, a discretionary review required for qualifying projects
reasoning: Discretionary review of development projects per LAMC 16.05; directly corresponds to the Site Plan Review category

name: Appeal (1st)
meaning: Indicates that an appeal has been filed against a prior determination in the case
reasoning: Suffix designating the first appeal of a planning decision; directly an appeal action

name: Density Bonus
meaning: Indicates that the project is using the city's Density Bonus Program which offers density incentives in exchange for providing affordable housing
reasoning: State density bonus law (Gov. Code 65915) implemented via LAMC 12.22.A.25; a program offering development bonuses for affordable housing

name: Conditional Use
meaning: Indicates that the applicant seeks a Conditional Use Permit
reasoning: General conditional use permit per LAMC 12.24; directly a conditional use entitlement (now inactive, replaced by CU1/CU2/CU3)

name: Housing Crisis Act
meaning: Indicates that the project is subject to the California Housing Crisis Act, which limits local discretion over qualifying housing projects
reasoning: Compliance determination for SB 330 Housing Crisis Act requirements; a mandated compliance review for housing projects

name: Transit Oriented Communities
meaning: Indicates that the project is using the city's Transit Oriented Communities Program which offers incentives to qualifying projects located near public transit
reasoning: TOC incentive program (LAMC 12.22.A.31) offering density and FAR bonuses near transit; a program designed to streamline permitting and offer development bonuses

name: Height District
meaning: Indicates that the applicant seeks to change the project's applicable Height District

name: Specific Plan Project Permit

name: Master Conditional Use Permit
meaning: Indicates that the applicant requests a Master Conditional Use Permit

name: Zone Change
meaning: Indicates that the applicant seeks to change the project's zoning designation

name: General Plan Amendment
meaning: Indicates that the applicant seeks an amendment to the General Plan
reasoning: Amendment to the General Plan land use designation; a plan amendment modifying the city's planning policy document

name: Vesting Zone Change
meaning: Indicates that the applicant seeks a zone change with vesting protections

name: Waiver of Dedication and Improvements
meaning: Indicates that the applicant is seeking relief from required right-of-way dedication or street improvement requirements
reasoning: Waiver of required street dedications and public improvements per LAMC 11.12/12.37; a request to waive conditions of development

name: Vesting Housing Crisis Act
meaning: Indicates that the project is utilizing the Housing Crisis Act and is seeking vesting protections

name: Code Amendment

name: Conditional Use Beverage

name: Priority Housing Project
meaning: Indicates that the project is eligible for priority processing under the city's Priority Housing Program

name: Zone Variance

name: Transfer of Development Rights
meaning: Indicates that the case involves transferring unused development capacity from one site to another

name: Specific Plan
meaning: Indicates that the case seeks adoption of a new Specific Plan or amendment of an existing one
reasoning: Establishment or amendment of a specific plan; a non-project-specific regulatory framework for a defined area

name: Zoning Administrator Adjustment
meaning: Indicates that the applicant seeks limited adjustments to dimensional standards such as yard, setback, area, height, building line, and floor area rules

name: Design Review Board
meaning: Indicates that the project requires Design Review Board review

name: General Plan Amendment Measure JJJ
meaning: Indicates that the applicant seeks a General Plan amendment subject to Measure JJJ affordable housing and labor standards

name: Coastal Development Permit

name: Sign District

name: Vesting Conditional Use

name: Vesting Zone Change Measure JJJ

name: Streamlined Infill Process

name: Class 3 Conditional Use

name: Building Line

name: Zoning Administrator Determination

name: Conditional Use Adult Entertainment

name: Community Design Overlay

name: Condominium

name: Plan Approval (1st)

name: Zone Change Measure JJJ
meaning: Indicates that the applicant seeks a zone change subject to Measure JJJ

name: Director's Determination

name: Project Review
meaning: Functionally equivalent to Site Plan Review

name: Development Agreement

name: Building and Safety Appeal

name: Specific Plan Project Compliance
meaning: Indicates that the project requires review for compliance with an applicable Specific Plan

name: Redevelopment Plan Project
meaning: Indicates that the project requires review for compliance with an applicable Redevelopment Plan

name: Miscellaneous

name: Fence Height

name: Modification (3rd)
meaning: Indicates that a third modification request has been filed for a prior planning approval

name: Mulholland Specific Plan

name: Permanent Supportive Housing

name: Community Plan Implementation Overlay Adjustment

name: Community Plan Update

name: Preliminary Parcel Map
meaning: Indicates that the applicant seeks approval of a preliminary parcel map for a subdivision or condominium project

name: Certificate of Compatibility

name: Specific Plan Project Permit Adjustment
meaning: Indicates that the applicant seeks an adjustment from standards in an applicable Specific Plan Project Permit process

name: Modification (1st)
meaning: Indicates that a first modification request has been filed for a prior planning approval

name: Supplemental Use District

name: Zoning Administrator Interpretation
meaning: Indicates that the applicant seeks an interpretation from the Zoning Administrator

name: Public Benefit
meaning: Indicates that the project involves a Public Benefit approval or review

name: Conditional Use Wireless
meaning: Indicates that the applicant seeks a Conditional Use Permit for a wireless telecommunications facility

name: Small Lot Subdivision
meaning: Indicates that the project involves a small lot subdivision

name: Director of Planning Interpretation
meaning: Indicates that the applicant seeks an interpretation from the Director of Planning

name: Parcel Map Exemption
meaning: Indicates that the applicant seeks an exemption from parcel map requirements

name: Specific Plan Project Exception
meaning: Indicates that the applicant seeks an exception from standards in an applicable Specific Plan Project review process

name: Community Plan Implementation Overlay

name: Sustainable Communities Environmental Assessment

name: Green Building
meaning: Indicates that the case involves Green Building review or requirements

name: Amendment to Council Instructions
meaning: Indicates that the case involves an amendment to prior Council instructions

name: Certificate of Appropriateness
meaning: Indicates that the project requires a Certificate of Appropriateness, typically for work affecting a historic resource or district

name: Amendment (2nd)
meaning: Indicates that a second amendment request has been filed for a prior planning approval

name: Amendment (1st)
meaning: Indicates that a first amendment request has been filed for a prior planning approval

name: Amendment (3rd)
meaning: Indicates that a third amendment request has been filed for a prior planning approval

meaning: Indicates that the case involves annexation or detachment of land

name: Class 2 Conditional Use

name: Redevelopment Plan Project Adjustment
